---
title: "fit_xiexiyey"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`test/fit_xiexiyey.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/fit_xiexiyey.py)
:::


## API Reference

#### `ansatz` {#ansatz}

```python
def ansatz(x, p)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/fit_xiexiyey.py#L24){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
